title: More Maces (Netherite Maces)
description: Adds new Netherite Maces, Netherite Mace Enchantments and a special Ability for the Last Mace. Updates and similar Mods will follow. I hope you will like it.
body:
This mod adds **3 new maces**, **4 new enchantments**, and **1 special ability** for the highest tier mace to Minecraft. I hope you enjoy the mod similar mods will follow!

Normal mace enchantments don’t work on the Netherite maces for balancing reasons, just like the Netherite mace enchantments don’t work on the vanilla mace. Let’s break down what this mod contains:

**Netherite/Harvester Maces:** The new maces are effective tools for chopping wood and also powerful weapons. Especially the highest-tier mace. It’s still far from being as good as an axe, but with the Lumberjack enchantment, the new mace is more effective for chopping trees.

Crafting Recipes:

![crafting recipe (1.21> replace mace with conduit)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d309789432cba6f6eeef714466f471fff2036698.gif)

Enchantments:

**Thunderstrike:** Hit an entity from more than 5 blocks of fall distance and lightning will strike it.

**Anchor (1-3):** After hitting an entity from more than 1.5 blocks of fall distance, it gets Slowness (2-4) based on which Netherite mace you used. The duration of the effect is based on the enchantment level.

**Descention (1-5):** Works just like Density, but less effective and made for the Netherite maces.

**Lumberjack:** If you break a wood log, the enchantment will destroy the upper and lower blocks if they are the same type as the wooden log you broke. Affected connected wood logs will cost 1 durability. Hold sneak to deactivate.

**Tier 3 Special Ability:** Every 200 ticks/10 seconds you can boost yourself upward. Be careful, you will take fall damage! (Right click with Tier 3 in main hand)

**_Feedback is welcome! This Project will get updated and similar Projects will follow!_**
